Merc-s..personality: A constitutionally weakened individual prone to chronic, progressive fluid accumulation states. The Mercurius Sulphuricus type tends toward sluggish vitality with a disposition marked by the gradual decline characteristic of the mercurial temperament.
Merc-s..mental_state: Mental faculties are dulled by the oppressive physical burden of fluid congestion and respiratory distress. The mind is weighed down, with difficulty concentrating due to the constant awareness of labored breathing and chest discomfort.
Merc-s..emotional_pattern: Emotionally characterized by the anxiety and restlessness common to the Mercurius base, compounded by the distress of suffocative sensations. There is a deep-seated weariness and resignation found in chronic, long-standing illness with a sense of being overwhelmed by persistent physical suffering.
